pages.text:
Exercise 5.7.29(a)
Higher_priority(p, q)
  if A[p].rank > A[q].rank then return true
  if A[p].rank < A[q].rank then return false
  return A[p].time < A[q].time 
// Swap helper 
Swap(i, j):
    temp ← A[i]
    A[i] ← A[j]
    A[j] ← temp
    location[A[i].code] ← i
    location[A[j].code] ← j
Algorithm UpgradeRequest(rank,time,passenger,code)
Input: rank,time,passenger,code
Output: updated heap with new request inserted 
n ← n+1
A[n].rank ← rank
A[n].time ← time
A[n].passenger ← passenger
A[n].code ← code
location[code] ←n 
i ← n
while i > 1 and higher_priority(i,⌊i/2 ⌋) do 
  Swap (i,⌊i/2 ⌋)
  i ← ⌊i/2 ⌋
Algorithm CancelRequest(code)
Input: code (confirmation code of the request to cancel)
Output: updated heap A  (request removed if found)
    if code not in location then
        return                  // no such request found
pos ← location[code]
    location.remove(code)
    if pos = n then             // deleting the last element
        n ← n - 1
        return
    // Move last element to pos
A[pos] ← A[n]
    location[A[pos].code] ← pos
    n ← n - 1
    if n = 0 then
        return

// Restore heap property (sift-down, similar to AssignUpgrades)
if pos > 1 and higher_priority(pos, ⌊pos/2⌋) then
    // sift up
    i ← pos
    while i > 1 and higher_priority(i, ⌊i/2 ⌋) do
        Swap(i, ⌊i/2 ⌋)
        i ← ⌊i/2 ⌋
else
    // sift down
    i ← pos
    while 2i ≤ n do
        s ← 2i
        if 2i+1 ≤ n and higher_priority(2i+1, 2i) then
            s ← 2i+1
        if higher_priority(s, i) then
            Swap(i, s)
            i ← s
        else
            break
Algorithm AssignUpgrades(k)
Input: k(number of first-class seats available for upgrade)
Output: list of up to k passengers selected for upgrade(highest priority first)
selected ← empty list             
while k > 0 and n > 0 do 
   best ← A[1]
   append best.passenger to selected 
   location.remove(best.code)
   if n = 1 then 
   n ← 0
   break 
  A[1] ← A[n]
  location[A[1].code] ← 1
  n ← n-1
// heapify-down from root
i ← 1
while 2i ≤ n do 
  largest ← i 
  if 2i ≤ n and higher_priority(2i, largest) then 
largest ← 2i

if 2i + 1 ≤ n and higher_priority(2i + 1 , largest) then
largest ← 2i + 1 
if largest = i then 
break
   Swap(i, largest)
   i ← largest 
k ← k-1 
end while 
return selected
